name: getFoundryJournal
description: Navigate Foundry VTT journals through the Foundry bridge plugin. Use this to list journals, search across journal content, read a specific journal entry or page, scan journals in ordered chunks, inspect an outline, identify likely entrypoints, resolve likely scene anchors, or use the newer story-navigation operations. Journal reads are paginated so large pages can be processed safely by smaller models.

query.description: Search phrase, scene hint, location, or title hint. Used with search, read, and anchors.

entryRef.description: Optional exact journal ID, UUID, or title for read operations.

pageRef.description: Optional exact page ID, UUID, or page title for read operations.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of list, search, scan, outline, entrypoint, or anchor results.

cursor.description: Optional scan cursor for continuing through all journals in order.

offset.description: Optional character offset for paginated read operations. Use the returned nextOffset to continue reading large journal pages.

maxChars.description: Optional maximum number of characters to return for a read operation. Use a smaller value for tiny models and continue with nextOffset if truncated.

channelKey.description: Optional override for the Foundry bridge channel key. Normally taken from toolsconfig.getFoundryBridge.channelKey.
